gigapan.name: Laguna de Santa Rosa (m12c)
gigapan.description:
I took this zoomed in I thought as far as possible, but the exif headers report 342 mm equivalent.  I am bummed at the focus, and I don't understand it.  it might be that I need to use Randy's trick of setting a shot timer, and increasing the delay a lot, so that the camera doesn't shake when the button is pushed.
I _thought_ this was my first attempt at doing the full 432 mm the Canon S5IS is capable of doing.
